app.name: ThrottleUp
app.live_status: Apple review in progress (Build 11/v1.0.1 submitted), Android paused until RC key set

brief.headline: ThrottleUp
brief.tagline: VIN-scan motorcycle maintenance tracker with live NHTSA recall alerts and multi-bike support.
brief.what_it_is: ThrottleUp is an iOS + Android app for motorcycle maintenance tracking. The VIN scanner pulls make / model / year / engine class live from NHTSA vPIC. Recall integration runs against the NHTSA Recalls API. Service intervals are set per bike (mileage + time based), push reminders fire 30 / 7 / 1 day before due. Multi-bike for the 2+-bike garage. Plus: maintenance log with photo attachments, PDF / CSV export, and anonymous public trip-sharing with privacy-cropped routes.
brief.who_for: Wrenchers, project-bike owners, custom builders, daily-driver tuners. Audience skews 20-55, ~95% male, deep European motorcycle community plus US restomod scene. Creators who sit well: ADV / touring vlogs (Itchy Boots style), garage-vlog channels, build-thread Instagram pages, cafe-racer / custom-builder accounts, oil-change tutorial creators, MotoVloggers.
features: VIN scanner: make / model / year / engine class pulled live from NHTSA vPIC database.
Recall integration: live lookup against NHTSA Recalls API, push notification when a recall drops for a registered bike.
Service interval reminders: per-bike, mileage + time based, push 30 / 7 / 1 day before due.
Maintenance log with photo attachments: every entry can carry vendor receipt + install photo.
Multi-bike management (Premium): unlimited bikes + larger riding groups.
PDF / CSV export: complete maintenance documentation, useful at resale as proof of care.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: recurring Premium subscription.
Pricing: 3.99 USD / month or 24.99 USD / year.
Free tier is deliberately generous: 1 bike, 1 riding group up to 4 members, unlimited entries, VIN decode, recall lookup, PDF / CSV export.
Premium unlocks: unlimited bikes, larger / more riding groups.
Strategy note: Free is generous so every rider gets in. Premium is for multi-bike garages + larger riding groups, not artificial limits.
brief.why_this_works: The market is empty. RIDEOLOGY (the big-name moto app) sits at 2.2 stars on the App Store, "Motorcycle Maintenance Log" has 1.9k downloads total. Most riders track in a Word doc or not at all. ThrottleUp's VIN scan + live NHTSA recall layer is genuinely a category-of-one feature. The audience (wrenchers + ADV riders) values tools and trusts other riders, so affiliate conversion is high when the creator is authentic — and very low when they are not.

en.subtitle: for moto creators and ADV riders
en.hero_quote: VIN scan, recall alerts, multi-bike. Earn from maintenance content you already make.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: ThrottleUp is an iOS + Android app for motorcycle maintenance tracking. The VIN scanner pulls make / model / year / engine class live from NHTSA vPIC. Recall integration runs against the NHTSA Recalls API. You set service intervals per bike (mileage + time based), push reminders fire 30 / 7 / 1 day before due. Multi-bike for those with 2+ bikes in the garage. Plus: maintenance log with photo attachments, PDF / CSV export, anonymous public trip-sharing with privacy-cropped routes.
en.why_this_works: The market is empty. RIDEOLOGY has 2.2 stars, "Motorcycle Maintenance Log" has 1.9k downloads total. Most riders track in a Word doc or not at all.
free_vs_premium: Free: 1 bike, 1 riding group with up to 4 members, unlimited maintenance entries, VIN decode, recall lookup, PDF / CSV export, public trip sharing.
Premium (3.99 USD/month or 24.99 USD/year): unlimited bikes + larger / more riding groups.
Deliberate strategy: Free is generous (every rider gets in with no friction), Premium is only for heavy riders with 2+ bikes or large groups.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates (no posting obligation).
audience_fit_good: ADV / touring (Itchy Boots style) IG, 50k-500k, high (loyal, maintenance-aware).
Tech / gear reviewers IG/YT, 100k-1M, high (tool mindset).
Cafe-racer / custom builders IG, 20k-300k, very high (co-promo via build log).
EU moto creators IG/TikTok, 5k-50k, high (smaller market).
audience_fit_poor: Sport-bike lifestyle TikTok poseur content (low maintenance-content fit).
Pure scenic-ride accounts without tool / maintenance angle.
Generic motorsport pages without bike-ownership signals.

reel_hooks.label: Faceless content (bike + UI as hero)
items: Screen recording "VIN scan in 3 seconds" — 15s, phone over bike, scanner reads VIN, cut to app with make/model/year filled in.
Garage B-roll with voiceover — 45s, B-roll of garage / tools / bike detail, voice: "I have 3 bikes, I used to track in a Word doc, here's what changed", cut to multi-bike switcher.
Comparison "RIDEOLOGY (2.2 stars) vs ThrottleUp" — 30s split-screen with both UIs.
Service-log time-lapse — 20s app screen, oil change entry + photo upload + reminder setup + reminder in 30 days.
Recall popup demo — 10s, push notification "RECALL for your 2021 Yamaha MT-07: brake line defect", cut to recall detail screen with NHTSA link-out.

reel_hooks.label: UGC / your voice (rider trust)
items: "How I track maintenance now" — 60s selfie next to bike, "I used to forget oil changes for 4 months, here's what I do now", cut to VIN scan + reminder setup.
Build vlog with app as 5-second beat — 90s, your normal maintenance vlog, ThrottleUp integrated naturally.
"POV: you're the guy with 3 bikes" — 30s in garage with multiple bikes, cut to multi-bike switcher.
Trip recap with app use — 60s ADV / touring recap, 10s beat cuts to app trip summary.
Cafe-racer build-log reveal — 45s, custom bike + app build log with photos per entry, "complete maintenance doc as PDF for resale".

story_ideas: Education story: recall notification screenshot + sticker "check yours now" + link sticker.
Social proof: "my entire maintenance history in 1 PDF" screenshot + link.
Direct ask: selfie story, "1 month Premium with my link" + link sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 tools every motorcycle owner needs" (ThrottleUp on slide 1, no hard sell).
"Why your service log matters at resale" (proof-of-care carousel, slide 7 = affiliate link).
"Recall alerts I would have missed without this app" (problem-to-solution).
en.posting_cadence: Moto-content audience: highest engagement Sat-Sun late morning ("weekend ride planning") and Wed evenings ("midweek maintenance"). 1-2 reels per week is plenty. ADV / touring content peaks late spring through early autumn. Always pair a reel with a 24h story + link sticker.
en.conversion_math: Micro MotoVlogger (15k IG, 1 reel): 9,000 views x 1.8% CTR = 162 clicks, 30% install = 49 installs, 5% Premium = 2-3 subs (Free is generous enough for 1-bike owners), 16 months x 3.99 USD x 50% = ~70-100 USD per reel. Mid-tier ADV rider (80k IG, 1 reel): 50,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 750 clicks, 30% install = 225 installs, 6% Premium = 14 subs, ~450 USD per reel (cap ~675 USD). Macro tech reviewer (300k IG, 1 service vlog): 180,000 views x 1% CTR = 1,800 clicks, 25% install = 450 installs, 7% Premium = 32 subs, ~1,020 USD per vlog (cap ~1,530 USD). Conversion is lower than e.g. Kelva or MyLoo because the Free tier is very generous (1 bike is enough for most). Focus on multi-bike + touring + ADV audiences.
tracking_model_lines: Your link throttleup.app/i/[yourhandle] works on any platform.
Android: Google Play install referrer passes handle natively, deterministic — once Android is unblocked.
iOS warm: Universal Link with handle.
iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic): signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink, live-verified via Wavelength.
RevenueCat webhook fires on Premium, 50% credited for 24 months.
Self-referral blocked. Family / friends through your link are fine.
onboarding_steps: Click the personal link from Mail 2 (valid 7 days).
Activate Free Lifetime Premium on your ThrottleUp account.
Dashboard at getklar.org/dashboard via magic link.
dashboard_lines: Installs split (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold) once channels are open.
Active Premium subs in your bucket.
Claimable + paid + carry-over + next payout date + refund holdback pipeline.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, B-roll of VIN scan + recall popup, garage B-roll snippets and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/throttleup/brand-assets (link goes live with your onboarding mail).
faq: Free tier is very generous — do I earn anything at all?
Yes, but not on every user. Conversion mix: ~60% stay Free (1 bike, small group), ~40% go Premium when they have 2+ bikes or plan trips for 10+ people. You earn on those 40%.
Can I promote recall content?
Yes, that is the USP. Please do NOT say "increases bike value" as a hard claim — we are a tracking tool, not a valuation service. Say "easier to sell" / "maintenance documentation ready" instead.
Build-log feature for custom builders — available?
v1 has maintenance log with photo attachments. Full build log with step-by-step documentation is V2 phase. Current state is enough for service history + resale proof.
Disclosure duty?
Yes. Rev-share = paid recommendation. #ad / #sponsored / IG "Paid Partnership". FTC / EU / UWG.
Flat fee on top?
Mid+ yes, 200-600 USD depending on reach. Macro 500-2,000 USD only if audience fit is crystal-clear (maintenance content, not posing content).
What if Premium pricing changes?
You continue to earn 50% on the then-current price.

de.subtitle: für Moto-Creator und ADV-Rider
de.hero_quote: VIN-Scan, Recall-Alerts, Multi-Bike. Verdien an Wartungs-Content den du eh schon machst.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: ThrottleUp ist eine iOS + Android-App für Motorrad-Wartungs-Tracking. VIN-Scanner zieht Marke / Modell / Jahr / Motorklasse live aus NHTSA vPIC. Recall-Integration läuft gegen NHTSA Recalls API. Du setzt Service-Intervalle pro Bike (kilometrisch + zeitbasiert), Push-Reminder feuert 30 / 7 / 1 Tag vor Fälligkeit. Multi-Bike für die mit 2+ Bikes in der Garage. Plus: Wartungs-Log mit Foto-Anhängen, PDF / CSV-Export, anonymes Public-Trip-Sharing mit Privacy-gekürzten Routen.
de.why_this_works: Markt ist leer. RIDEOLOGY hat 2,2 Sterne, "Motorcycle Maintenance Log" hat 1.900 Downloads total. Die meisten Rider tracken in einem Word-Doc oder gar nicht.
free_vs_premium: Free: 1 Bike, 1 Fahrgruppe mit bis zu 4 Mitgliedern, unbegrenzt Wartungs-Einträge, VIN-Decode, Recall-Lookup, PDF / CSV-Export, Public-Trip-Sharing.
Premium (3,99 USD/Monat oder 24,99 USD/Jahr): unbegrenzt Bikes + größere / mehr Fahrgruppen.
Bewusste Strategie: Free ist großzügig (jeder Rider kommt rein ohne Reibung), Premium nur für Heavy-Rider mit 2+ Bikes oder großen Gruppen.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates (kein Posting-Zwang).
audience_fit_good: Cafe-Racer / Custom-Builder IG, 20k-300k, sehr hoch (Co-Promo via Build-Log).

reel_hooks.label: Faceless Content (Bike + UI als Hero)
items: Screen-Recording "VIN-Scan in 3 Sekunden" — 15s, Phone übers Bike, Scanner liest VIN, Cut auf App mit Marke/Modell/Jahr ausgefüllt.
Garage-B-Roll mit Voiceover — 45s, B-Roll von Garage / Tools / Bike-Detail, Voice: "Ich habe 3 Bikes, früher Word-Doc, jetzt anders", Cut auf Multi-Bike-Switcher.
Comparison "RIDEOLOGY (2,2 Sterne) vs ThrottleUp" — 30s Split-Screen mit beiden UIs.
Service-Log-Time-Lapse — 20s App-Screen, Öl-Wechsel-Eintrag + Foto-Upload + Reminder-Setup + Reminder in 30 Tagen.
Recall-Popup-Demo — 10s, Push-Notification "RECALL für deine 2021 Yamaha MT-07: Bremsleitung-Defekt", Cut auf Recall-Detail-Screen mit NHTSA-Link-out.

reel_hooks.label: UGC / Deine Stimme (Rider-Trust)
items: "How I track maintenance now" — 60s Selfie neben Bike, "Ich habe Öl-Wechsel 4 Monate vergessen, jetzt mache ich das", Cut auf VIN-Scan + Reminder-Setup.
Build-Vlog mit App als 5-Sekunden-Beat — 90s, dein normaler Wartungs-Vlog, ThrottleUp natural integriert.
"POV: you're the guy with 3 bikes" — 30s in der Garage mit mehreren Bikes, Cut auf Multi-Bike-Switcher.
Trip-Recap mit App-Use — 60s ADV / Touring-Recap, 10s Beat Cut auf App-Trip-Summary.
Cafe-Racer-Build-Log-Reveal — 45s, Custom-Bike + App-Build-Log mit Fotos pro Eintrag, "komplette Wartungs-Doku als PDF für den Verkauf".

story_ideas: Education-Story: Recall-Notification-Screenshot + Sticker "check deins jetzt" + Link-Sticker.
Social-Proof: "meine komplette Wartungs-Historie in 1 PDF" Screenshot + Link.
Direct-Ask: Selfie-Story, "1 Monat Premium mit meinem Link" + Link-Sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 Tools die jeder Motorrad-Owner braucht" (ThrottleUp Slide 1, kein Hard-Sell).
"Warum dein Service-Log beim Verkauf zählt" (Proof-of-Care-Carousel, Slide 7 = Affiliate-Link).
"Recall-Alerts die ich ohne diese App verpasst hätte" (Problem-to-Solution).
de.posting_cadence: Moto-Content-Audience: höchstes Engagement Sa-So spät morgens ("Weekend-Ride-Planung") und Mi abends ("Midweek-Maintenance"). 1-2 Reels pro Woche reicht. ADV / Touring-Content Peak Spätfrühling bis Frühherbst. Immer Reel mit 24h-Story + Link-Sticker pairen.
de.conversion_math: Mikro-MotoVlogger (15k IG, 1 Reel): 9.000 Views x 1,8% CTR = 162 Klicks, 30% Install = 49 Installs, 5% Premium = 2-3 Subs (Free reicht für 1-Bike-Owner), 16 Mo x 3,99 USD x 50% = ~70-100 USD pro Reel. Mid-Tier ADV-Rider (80k IG, 1 Reel): 50.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 750 Klicks, 30% Install = 225 Installs, 6% Premium = 14 Subs, ~450 USD pro Reel (Cap ~675 USD). Macro Tech-Reviewer (300k IG, 1 Service-Vlog): 180.000 Views x 1% CTR = 1.800 Klicks, 25% Install = 450 Installs, 7% Premium = 32 Subs, ~1.020 USD pro Vlog (Cap ~1.530 USD). Conversion niedriger als z.B. Kelva oder MyLoo weil Free-Tier sehr großzügig (1 Bike reicht für die meisten). Fokus auf Multi-Bike + Touring + ADV-Audiences.
tracking_model_lines: Dein Link throttleup.app/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform.
Android: Google Play Install-Referrer gibt Handle nativ weiter, deterministisch — sobald Android frei ist.
iOS cold (~99% des Creator-Traffic): signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink, live-verifiziert via Wavelength.
RevenueCat-Webhook feuert beim Premium, 50% für 24 Monate gutgeschrieben.
Self-Referral geblockt. Familie / Freunde über deinen Link sind OK.
onboarding_steps: Klick den persönlichen Link aus Mail 2 (7 Tage gültig).
Free Lifetime Premium auf deinem ThrottleUp-Account aktivieren.
dashboard_lines: Installs-Split (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold) sobald Kanäle offen sind.
Claimable + Paid + Carry-over + nächster Auszahlungs-Termin + Refund-Holdback-Pipeline.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, B-Roll von VIN-Scan + Recall-Popup, Garage-B-Roll-Snippets und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/throttleup/brand-assets (Link wird mit deinem Onboarding-Mail aktiv).
faq: Free-Tier ist sehr großzügig — verdiene ich überhaupt was?
Ja, aber nicht an jedem User. Conversion-Mix: ~60% bleiben Free (1 Bike, kleine Gruppe), ~40% gehen Premium wenn sie 2+ Bikes haben oder Trips für 10+ Leute planen. Du verdienst auf diese 40%.
Kann ich Recall-Content promoten?
Ja, das ist der USP. Bitte NICHT "steigert den Bike-Wert" als Hard-Claim — wir sind Tracking-Tool, kein Bewertungs-Service. Sag stattdessen "einfacher zu verkaufen" / "Wartungs-Dokumentation ready".
Build-Log-Feature für Custom-Builder — verfügbar?
v1 hat Wartungs-Log mit Foto-Anhängen. Voller Build-Log mit Step-by-Step ist V2-Phase. Current State reicht für Service-Historie + Wiederverkaufs-Beweis.
Kennzeichnungspflicht?
Ja. Rev-Share = bezahlte Empfehlung. #ad / #Werbung / IG "Paid Partnership". FTC / EU / UWG.
Flat-Fee on-top?
Mid+ ja, 200-600 USD je nach Reach. Macro 500-2.000 USD nur wenn Audience-Fit kristallklar (Wartungs-Content, kein Posing-Content).
Was wenn Premium-Preis sich ändert?
Du verdienst weiter 50% auf den dann aktuellen Preis.
